tools.name: Asset Vault
tools.description: Local-first library for AI-generated game assets: import, triage, dedupe, search, export.

tools.name: BatchLapse
tools.description: Batch video timelapse exporter for MP4, WebM, and GitHub-friendly GIFs.

tools.name: Cutscene Converter
tools.description: Prepare AI-generated videos for game engines with batch conversion, trimming, scaling, and combining.

tools.name: DepthMap AI
tools.description: Batch depth-map and WebP generator for local AI image workflows.

tools.name: ASCII 3D
tools.description: Image-to-ASCII converter with optional depth-map driven 3D parallax exports.

tools.name: Image to 3D
tools.description: Local image-to-3D workflow for mesh, texture, and 3D asset generation.

tools.name: MarkRush
tools.description: Fast local Markdown viewer/editor built for huge files and folders.

tools.name: OpenSplit
tools.description: Multi-pane terminal harness for AI coding agents, shells, and SSH sessions.

tools.name: Palette Forge
tools.description: Extract project palettes, remap assets, audit palette drift, and export engine-agnostic LUT/index textures.

tools.name: Seamless Image Edit
tools.description: Create seamless and tileable texture outputs from images or folders with seam repair, flattening, and 2x2 preview.

tools.name: Sprite Atlas Packer
tools.description: Turn loose sprite frames into deterministic TexturePacker-compatible PNG/WebP atlases.

tools.name: Multi-Angle Edit
tools.description: Local multi-angle image editor: re-render a photo from a new camera angle with Qwen-Image-Edit + the Multiple-Angles LoRA on your own GPU.

tools.name: ImageToSplat
tools.description: Local TripoSplat workflow for turning a single image into Gaussian splat and point-cloud 3D exports.

tools.name: SplatScape
tools.description: Portable FPS-style explorer for 3D Gaussian splat scenes with WASD and mouse-look navigation.

tools.name: Painterly Clouds 3D
tools.description: Painterly Three.js cloud scene for stylized skyboxes, wallpapers, and motion art.

tools.name: Venice Media
tools.description: Local Venice API media workspace for images, video, music, voice, and cleanup.

tools.name: PurplePlanet
tools.description: Luminous Three.js planet motion art for live wallpapers and screensavers.

tools.name: StarGaze
tools.description: Glittering Three.js starfield wallpaper and screensaver with tunable motion.
